Home › Apply & Eligibility

Apply & Eligibility

How to apply

Applications are currently closed. Review the criteria and deadlines below, then join the waitlist at the bottom of this page to be notified the moment the new intake opens.

Eligibility criteria

  • Currently enrolled undergraduate in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
  • Minimum 3.0 cumulative GPA
  • At least one completed course in web development, databases, or systems programming
  • Available full-time for all 10 weeks — no concurrent internship or coursework
  • Open to U.S. citizens, permanent residents, and international students with valid visa status

Application steps

  1. Review eligibility criteria and the four research tracks
  2. Complete the online application below
  3. Submit an unofficial transcript and one faculty reference
  4. Upload a short statement of interest (500 words max)
  5. Interview with a track mentor (selected applicants only)
  6. Receive a decision by the notification date

Key deadlines

Application deadlines for the upcoming program year
Milestone Date
Applications open December 1, 2026
Priority deadline February 6, 2027
Final deadline March 20, 2027
Decisions released April 10, 2027
Program begins June 1, 2027

Frequently asked questions

Do I need prior WordPress experience?

No. Solid fundamentals in PHP or JavaScript (from any coursework) are enough — the first week is a paid onboarding sprint covering WordPress-specific concepts.

Is the fellowship paid?

Yes. Fellows receive a flat stipend for the 10-week program, paid biweekly, plus a travel allowance for the end-of-summer showcase.

Can I apply if I have a concurrent internship?

The program requires full-time availability for all 10 weeks, so a concurrent internship or heavy course load isn’t compatible.

Do international students qualify?

Yes — U.S. citizens, permanent residents, and international students with valid visa status are all eligible to apply.

How are tracks assigned?

You’ll rank your top two track preferences on the application; final placement balances student interest with mentor capacity.

Applications are currently closed

The application form will open soon for the new intake. Leave your email below and we’ll notify you the moment it does.

One email when applications open — nothing else.
